scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev
scripts.build: npm run db:generate --prefix server && node scripts/hostinger-client-env.mjs && npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix server && npm run db:generate --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
